description: Legal agreement, possibly regarding a dowry, between Yequtiʾel b. Moshe and his wife Munā. In the hand of Hillel b. ʿEli (active 1066–1108 CE). Goitein suggests that this document dates to 1091 CE (see his attached transcription). Another copy of the same document is found at ENA NS 30.8 (PGPID 11371). Yequtiʾel b. Moshe is also known from T-S 24.1, dated 1082 CE, and numerous other documents from the India Book. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: הסכם משפטי, אולי בענין נדוניה, בין יקותיאל בן משה ואשתו מונא; בכתב יד הלל בן עלי; כ-1091 לספירה; עותק נוסף של המסמך נמצא ב-ENA NS 30.8
